channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [WFLA News Channel 8] House GOP leaders unveil stopgap funding bill ahead of expected vote next week
item.description: House Republican leaders are preparing to bring a stopgap measure that would keep federal agencies funded through Dec. 4 to the floor next week, kicking off a high-stakes effort to avert a potential government shutdown before the end of the fiscal year on Sept. 30. Republicans unveiled the text of the short-term measure, also known [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] TPA flights grounded as storms moved across Tampa Bay
item.description: Heavy thunderstorms caused a ground stop at Tampa International Airport (TPA) on Friday. According to the FAA's website, a ground stop was issued for TPA from 1:30 p.m. to 4 p.m.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] FAA will allow Boeing to resume certifying planes after years of safety efforts
item.description: Boeing will be allowed to take responsibility for certifying all of its 737 Max and 787 planes starting next week, the Federal Aviation Administration said Friday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] RFK Jr. to join Florida agriculture leaders to discuss orange juice standards
item.description: United States Rep. Laurel Lee will hold a press conference in Lakeland with Robert F. Kennedy Jr., Senator Ashley Moody, Florida agriculture leaders, and Florida citrus growers.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Security at the World Cup final ramped up for Sunday's Argentina-Spain match
item.description: As Argentina and Spain prepare to face off, a network of federal agents, law enforcement, and private companies will run a "game plan" two years in the making to ensure the World Cup final is safe.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 'I don’t think we’ll ever win this war': DEA boss gets candid on America’s fentanyl crisis
item.description: The head of the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration believes America’s ongoing fentanyl crisis in the U.S. may be too big to get under control.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] MLB restricts dugout iPad use to prevent use of AI to make decisions
item.description: Major League Baseball is restricting iPad usage in dugouts to prevent the tablets from running artificial intelligence to help make decisions.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Will Florida see its next named storm this weekend?
item.description: Forecasters are tracking a broad disturbance in the Gulf of Mexico off the Florida coast that could bring much-needed rain to parched communities this weekend.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] USF marine science fire: St. Pete recovery operations save vital scientific research despite heavy damage
item.description: University leaders announced that recovery operations have yielded remarkably successful results two months after a lightning fire heavily damaged the University of South Florida St. Petersburg's College of Marine Science in May.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: officer-involved] [BREAKING] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Bradenton officer justified in deadly shooting of Willie Bell, prosecutors say
item.description: The Florida Department of Law Enforcement has concluded its investigation into the March 10 officer-involved shooting that killed Willie Tyrone Bell, 56, during a search warrant in Bradenton. The State Attorney’s Office determined the SWAT officer's use of deadly force was legally justified.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Will coming rain be enough to break Florida’s drought?
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Could the Mega Millions hit $1 billion? Here's how long it would take
[Polk County Sheriff] Prolific retail theft sus...

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Cheapest World Cup Final seats cost more than average monthly US pay
item.description: World Cup final ticket prices are soaring, with resale seats starting around $7,700 and lower-level seats topping $10,000.

item.title: [BREAKING] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough County deputies recovering after ‘ambush’ shooting in Ruskin
item.description: Two Hillsborough County sheriff's deputies were airlifted to Tampa General Hospital after an armed suspect ambushed them in Ruskin on Thursday afternoon.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida parents have a month to shop for discounted school supplies
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Huge AI data center rejected in Florida. Why are they so controversial?
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Feel the ground shake in Florida Thursday? What experts say it was
[The Florida Channel] 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Florida Economic
item.description: 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Florida Economic first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Florida Economic first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 5-year-old riding scooter in critical condition after being hit by vehicle: North Port PD
item.description: North Port police said a 5-year-old girl has been hospitalized after an accident on Thursday afternoon.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 1-on-1 with Rays analyst Brian Anderson
item.description: Brian Anderson breaks down how Junior Caminero's growth, a versatile lineup, and a mid-season pitching move have Tampa Bay in first place entering the second half.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] A 7.3 earthquake hits Mexico-Guatemala border with no immediate damage reported
item.description: A strong earthquake struck the southern Mexican Pacific coast on Friday, right on the border with Guatemala, and was felt from Mexico City to El Salvador.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Hillsborough County announces reduced in-class screen time for K-2 students
item.description: Hillsborough County Public Schools (HCPS) announced new guidelines to reduce screen time in K-2 classrooms.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Manatee County experiencing medical boom amid population growth to meet healthcare needs
item.description: Manatee County is experiencing a medical boom amid the population growth to meet increasing healthcare needs.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Lightning Community Hero nominations open for the upcoming season
item.description: Good Morning Tampa Bay anchor Deiah Riley is entering her third season with the Bolts introducing a new Lightning Community Hero at every home game.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 46-year-old deputy chief at Manatee County EMS arrested for engaging in lewd acts with minor: MCSO
item.description: Officials have arrested a deputy chief at Manatee County Emergency Services for engaging in lewd acts with a minor.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Recall issued for certain Panasonic toaster ovens due to risk of shock or fire
item.description: A recall has been issued for Panasonic Electric Toaster Ovens due to a risk of shock or fire hazard.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Driver dead after car wedges under semi-truck in Winter Haven crash
item.description: One person is dead after a compact car became wedged under a semi-truck at a Winter Haven intersection on Thursday morning, according to the Polk County Sheriff's Office.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Vehicle fire injures one near Oscar Scherer State Park
